title: Waxed Item Fix
description: Which blocks did I honeycomb again?
body:
Information
---
A nice and simple visual tweak to make building with copper a little more convenient (:

Versions
---
This should work in 1.17 to current

It may work in earlier versions if you're using a backport mod that adds copper but I'm not sure.

This tweak not for you? 
---
Check out my other projects, I might have something you didn't know you needed! :D
